nodes.name: H4YF (HEAT4YAFEAT)
nodes.description: Core brand entity — eCommerce brand establishment project

nodes.name: Knowledge Graph Architecture
nodes.description: File-based JSON knowledge graph with Python CLI for persistent cross-session memory. Stored in .claude/knowledge-graph.json, committed to git for versioning. No external services required.

properties.rationale: Richer persistent memory across sessions without external service dependencies
alternatives_considered: Flat JSONL transcripts (non-queryable, no entity relationships)

nodes.name: Claude Code Harness
nodes.description: SessionStart/Stop hooks, skills, and MCP servers governing the development workflow. Global hooks: git identity + commit validation. Project hooks: knowledge graph lifecycle (CONTEXT.md regeneration, auto-commit on stop).

project_hooks: SessionStart: validate graph, regenerate CONTEXT.md, export KG_SESSION_ID
Stop: auto-commit and push graph if dirty

nodes.name: Knowledge Graph CLI (kg.py)
nodes.description: Python CLI at .claude/scripts/kg.py. Subcommands: summary, add-node, update-node, remove-node, add-edge, list, query, neighbors, validate, init. Python stdlib only — no pip installs.

nodes.name: Cross-platform Hook Runner (hooks.py)
nodes.description: Single Python entry point for all Claude Code project hooks (.claude/scripts/hooks.py). Handles session-start (validate, regenerate CONTEXT.md, export session ID) and session-stop (auto-commit/push graph if dirty). Uses sys.executable — no PATH assumptions, works on Mac/Linux/Windows.

nodes.name: Python Hook Runner over Bash
nodes.description: Chose Python (hooks.py) over bash scripts for hooks to achieve device/platform/model-agnostic harness. Bash scripts excluded Windows; Python 3 is available on all Claude Code platforms.

properties.rationale: Platform agnostic — same code runs on Mac desktop, Linux CLI, Windows desktop, and web/remote environments
properties.tradeoff: Requires Python 3 on PATH as 'python3' (Mac/Linux) or via equivalent on Windows

edges.notes: Knowledge graph is an enhancement layered onto the Claude Code harness
kg.py is the concrete implementation of the graph architecture
Harness drives development of the H4YF brand platform
hooks.py is the project-level hook layer within the harness
hooks.py calls kg.py for validate and summary operations
hooks.py is the implementation of the cross-platform hook decision
